description: Evidence-based health, wellness, and longevity hacks. Backed by 2026 research. Targets both general wellness seekers and the 40+ longevity-focused audience.
tone: calm, trustworthy, science-backed, empowering — never alarmist
hook_templates: One habit that adds {N} years (backed by {year} studies)
Why {supplement/habit} is overrated — and what actually works
The longevity protocol {N} centenarians have in common
{N} foods science says you should eat every day after {age}
required_disclaimers: Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making changes to your diet, exercise, or supplement routine.
